summary: Iteration 4 (router refactor + Notification Center) fully verified. All 62 backend pytest cases PASS across regression suite + new notifications suite. Frontend Notification Bell + dedicated Notifications page work on rep and owner consoles. Resend integration is env-driven (empty key → log fallback confirmed via TestPasswordReset).

issues: Recharts still logs width(-1)/height(-1) console warning on first render (pre-existing since iteration_1).

critical_code_review_comments: Refactor is clean: server.py is 60 lines, all routers mount under /api. No endpoint drift detected (all 44 legacy pytest cases still pass unchanged).
Notification emission is well-scoped: proposals/campaigns/sponsorships/tv_projects/representatives all correctly guarded by change-detection (same-status → no-op verified in dedicated tests).
Sponsorship guard for non-active TV projects returns 400 as required; no orphan notification emitted.

email_service.send_password_reset_email respects RESEND_API_KEY: empty → logs '[PASSWORD RESET · no RESEND_API_KEY]', set → attempts resend.Emails.send; sender comes from RESEND_FROM_EMAIL. No hardcoded values.
Minor: /app/frontend/src/pages/Notifications.jsx renders empty state without a `notif-empty` testid (bell panel has one; page does not). Non-blocking, but adding it would help test symmetry.
Minor: notifications router lacks a delete endpoint; not required by spec but worth considering for future clean-up UX.
Notifications collection index creation is in seed.create_indexes() — verified no duplicate index errors in backend logs.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_notifications.py (new — 18 tests covering all 7 emission rules + endpoint contract + dedup + mark-all-read + non-active sponsorship guard)

success_rate.frontend: 100% notification UI (bell, badge, panel, view-all, list, filters, mark-all) on both rep and admin consoles

test_credentials: Owner: admin@independentmedia.hub / Admin2026! ; Reps: victor.laurent@parismedia.fr / Rep2026! ; amelia.hart@londonhouse.co.uk / Rep2026!
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed proposals/campaigns/sponsorships and one temp rep (deleted on teardown). One extra TV project is created and deleted per module. Notifications collection accumulates TEST-labelled events (safe, scoped to test data).
context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration_4 = router refactor + notifications. New pytest file /app/backend/tests/test_notifications.py covers: (1) notification endpoint contract (auth, unread-count, sorted-desc, 404 on foreign notification, unread_only filter), (2) proposal.submitted + proposal.approved with admin_notes appended + same-status dedup, (3) campaign.created with agency+client+price in message, (4) sponsorship.created + 400 guard on non-active TV project, (5) tv_project.launched to reps on create-active, tv_project.status.closed to prior sponsors only, tv_project.status.active on reopen, closed→closed no-op, (6) representative.suspended / reactivated / password_reset (temp rep re-authenticates to inspect its own notifications), no-op on name-only patch, (7) POST /notifications/mark-all-read zeroes unread-count. Frontend NotificationBell + /rep/notifications and /admin/notifications routes verified via Playwright.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found. Router refactor is a strict superset of prior behavior.
